HOME.TITLE: Cartago Football Agency
HOME.SUBTITLE: Elite Representation • Global Network • Strategic Growth
HOME.ABOUT_TITLE: International positioning with premium football expertise
HOME.ABOUT_TEXT: We help players, clubs and partners move faster with strong scouting, negotiation support and strategic visibility across Europe, Africa and the Middle East.
HOME.POSITIONING_TEXT: Cartago Football Agency connects talent, clubs and opportunities through a premium international network.
HOME.VISION_TEXT: Become a global reference in football representation and talent development.
HOME.MISSION_TEXT: Empower athletes through strategic career management, international exposure and professional excellence.
HOME.PLAYERS_TEXT: Pagination is available here on the home page so you can manage 30 players or more without opening another page.
HOME.TEAM_TITLE: Every team member visible directly on the home page
HOME.SERVICES_TITLE: Player and club services in the same home experience
HOME.READY_TEXT: Players, clubs and partners can reach the agency directly.
HOME.CONTACT_TEXT: Players, clubs and partners can reach the agency directly from the website.

PLAYERS.TITLE: Our Players
PLAYERS.PAGE_TEXT: The page includes search at the top and pagination so you can manage 30 players or more.
PLAYERS.SEARCH: Search by player, nationality, club or position
PLAYERS.SEARCH_SHORT: Search by player, nationality or club
PLAYERS.EMPTY: No players found with the current search.
PLAYERS.AUTO_PROFILE: Automatically generated from the latest profile data.
PLAYERS.CV_TEXT: This page updates automatically with the player photo, club, logo, statistics and links you enter from the admin interface. It stays presentable even when the underlying data changes.
PLAYERS.CONTACT_TEXT: Cartago Football Agency can share scouting information, video analysis and technical follow-up based on the current player profile.

TEAM.TITLE: Our Team
TEAM.PAGE_TEXT: Team cards include image zones that you can replace with real photos later.
TEAM.CONTACTS_TEXT: This page is public and groups the contact details of the agency team.

SERVICES.TITLE: Services
SERVICES.PAGE_TEXT: Every service below is loaded from the backend and can be managed by the admin area.

CONTACT.TITLE: Contact
CONTACT.PAGE_TEXT: The public user does not need a login. This form is directly connected to the backend.
CONTACT.NAME: Name
CONTACT.SUBJECT: Subject
CONTACT.LOGIN_REQUIRED: Please log in to send a message.
CONTACT.SEND_ERROR: Unable to send the message right now.

APPLY_PLAYER.TITLE: Join the agency
APPLY_PLAYER.TEXT: This form is connected to the backend and visible in the admin area.

APPLY_CLUB.TITLE: Send a club recruitment request
APPLY_CLUB.TEXT: When the admin clicks a request, it opens a dedicated detail interface.

FOOTER.AGENCY_TEXT: Elite representation for football talents worldwide.
